author: gb9t
content: Phase C /loop iter 62→63: USER REDIRECT — pivoting from depth-first to breadth-first Tier-2 wrappers, then return to Tier-3. Closing iter 62: registered design-kernel-cgroup-rstat (rstat — already done). Discovered kernel/locking 00-overview already exists from iter 11 (good — no duplication needed). Wrote 2 new Tier-2 wrappers as iter 63: kernel/bpf/00-overview.md (eBPF subsystem umbrella: 40+ prog types + 30+ map types + verifier + JIT + BTF + helpers + kfuncs + trampolines + struct_ops + bpf_iter + LSM + cgroup-attach + bpffs pinning; declares 17 Tier-3 children + 2 mandatory TLA+ models verifier_soundness + jit_correctness; CRITICAL — referenced 30+ times across already-written net/sched/cls-bpf, net/sched/sch-bpf, net/sched/act-bpf, net/xfrm/bpf, net/netfilter/conntrack-bpf, net/netfilter/flowtable, etc. — 10 REQ-O / 8 AC-O, 0 open) + kernel/time/00-overview.md (timekeeping subsystem umbrella: timekeeping w/ wall+monotonic+boottime+raw+TAI clocks, hrtimer per-CPU rb-tree, legacy timer wheel, posix-timers + posix-cpu-timers, clocksource registration + watchdog, clockevents, tick (periodic/one-shot/nohz_idle/nohz_full), alarmtimer for RTC-wakeup, time-namespace per-task offsets, NTP discipline via adjtimex, sched_clock per-CPU, timer_migration; declares 11 Tier-3 children + 2 mandatory TLA+ models timekeeping_seqcount + hrtimer_rbtree — 8 REQ-O / 6 AC-O, 0 open). 25 upstream paths validated against baseline 27a26ccfd528. Total: 164 .design docs (26 Tier-2s now: 16 top-level + 10 sub). Audit count of existing 00-overview.md files: 29. Confirmed-existing top-level Tier-2s: arch/block/crypto/drivers/fs/init/io_uring/ipc/kernel/lib/mm/net/security/sound/virt (15). Sub-Tier-2s: arch/x86 + fs/{vfs,proc,sysfs} + kernel/{bpf,cgroup,locking} + net/{ipv6,netfilter+(ipset+ipvs),sched,xfrm} (14 — 4 prior + 10 nested). Continuing breadth-first: virt/kvm + drivers/base next.
